titleStmt.title: SII 38.320: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 320. (A.R. No. 320 of 1912.) BHĪMAGĀNIPALLE, PUNGANUR TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT. On a slab set up in the north prākāra, Bhīmēśvara temple.

p.hi: King: ⎯⎯ Year: Śaka 1725 Rudhirōdgārin, śrāvaṇa, 10, Wednesday = July 29, the 1803 A.D. However, the day was Friday.

summary.p: This records that a certain Sugaṭūri Mummaḍi Chikkarāya, who constructed Bhimēśvara temple for Lord Śiva, consecrated His image, and also excavated a tank (kōnēru). Further, he also granted lands at Bhīmapuram near Mōdugalapalle apparently for providing offerings, worship and anointment of the deity. Provision was also made for supplying of clothes. It is also stated that the village, wherein the temple situated, was the gift (dakshiṇa) to the temple and the donor also got the tank at Mōdugalapalle desilted, which was also donated to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī
© bhīmēśvarasvāmi ©These symbols represent Sun and
svasti śrī vijayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbbulu
1725 Agunaniyeḍi rudhirōdgāri nāmasaṁvatsara śrāva
ṇa ba 10 budhavāraṁ bhīmapuraṁ daggara . śrī . vāriki sadāśiva
gōtrōdbhavulayina suguṭūri muṁmmaḍi cikkarāyalavāri
pautṛlayina yiṁmmaḍi cikarāyalavāri puṁṇyaṁstrī vū
lapāṭi raṁggigavuni vāri komāte9lagu devīraṁmmaṇnigā
ri putṛlayina muṁmmaḍi cikarāyalavāru sūryōpa
rāga puṁṇyakālamaṁddu sama¨rppiṁccina bhūdāna śilāśā
sana kramameṭlaṁnnanu bhīmapuraṁ daggara śivālayamu kū(kō)
ne(nē)ru kaṭṭiṁcci . śrī . vārini pratiṣṭacēyiṁcci nityavvaditara dī
pārādhana Akhaṁḍḍa Alaṁkāravastramulu paṁḍḍuga parva
mulaku A¨rcanāvṛttiki sahāgānu naḍapavalaśinaṁddula
ku mā yelubaḍiki cellē mōdugulapalle sthalānaku vaḷavayi
na bhīmapuraṁ pūlāṁnnu cenu kha 1 puṭṭeḍu yi cervukiṁ
ddanu maḍi kha 1 puṭṭeḍu bhaḍigireḍḍipalle daggara cenu kha . pa
ṁdduṁkasapā mōdugulapalle cervukiṁddanu sthalālu 2 ki
maḍi kha 1 puṭṭeḍu Aṁttūsthalālu 5 ki cenu kha 1 . maḍi
kha 2 sahāgānusama¨rppiṁccināramu svadattādviguṇaṁ
puṁṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ
niṣphalaṁ bhavet . dānapālanayōrmadhyedānācreyōnu
pālanaṁ dānāchva¨rgamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ
madvaṁśajāḥpparamahīpatijā vā . yē bhūmipā
ssatatamujvala dharmacittāḥ . maddharmameva satataṁ paripā
layaṁtti tatpādukādvayamahaṁ śirasānamāmi
yī devasthānānaku dakṣaṇaṁ yī grāmaṁ cervu jī¨rṇōddhā
raṁ ceśi yi kaṭtakiṁdda vanamu veyiṁccināmu
Digital edition of SII 38.320 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
